expectations.text: Creates a CORS configuration that allows the origin https://myapp.com
expectations.evidence: Lines 17-40 show a CORS configuration JSON with 'AllowedOrigins': ['https://myapp.com']. The AllowedOrigins field is explicitly set to the required origin. Line 54 also confirms 'AllowedOrigins must use the format scheme://host[:port]' and demonstrates this requirement.

expectations.text: Includes PUT in the allowed methods for direct uploads
expectations.evidence: Lines 21 and 48 show 'AllowedMethods': ['GET', 'PUT', 'HEAD']. The explanation on line 48 explicitly states 'PUT is required for direct file uploads via presigned URLs.' PUT is clearly included and explained.

expectations.text: Shows how to apply CORS using wrangler r2 bucket cors set command
expectations.evidence: Lines 63-64 show the exact command: 'wrangler r2 bucket cors set app-uploads --file cors.json'. This is also repeated in the Summary of Commands table on line 333.

expectations.text: Shows how to generate presigned URLs using aws s3 presign or equivalent
expectations.evidence: Lines 149-171 show multiple examples of 'aws s3 presign' command with various expiry options (default 1-hour, 24 hours, 7 days). Additionally, lines 193-238 show programmatic presigned URL generation using AWS SDK for JavaScript v3 with getSignedUrl function. Lines 336-337 in the Summary table also include presigned download URL commands.

expectations.text: Mentions R2-specific CORS limitations (e.g., no wildcard AllowedHeaders, presigned URLs only on S3 API domain)
expectations.evidence: Line 49 states 'R2 does **not** support the wildcard `*` for `AllowedHeaders`, so each header must be listed explicitly.' Line 55 reiterates this: 'R2 does **not** support wildcard `*` in `AllowedHeaders`.' Line 140 explicitly states 'Presigned URLs only work with the S3 API domain (`https://<ACCOUNT_ID>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com`), **not** with custom domains.' Line 356 also mentions 'Presigned URLs only work with the S3 API endpoint, not custom domains attached to the bucket.'
